scripts.build: yarn clean && yarn generate-version && yarn compile-src && yarn build:esm && yarn build:cjs && node ../../scripts/write-dist-package-jsons.js
scripts.test:coverage: yarn build && node scripts/ensure-test-prereqs.cjs && c8 --all --src src --exclude-after-remap --exclude=src/**/*.d.ts --exclude=src/client_version.ts --exclude=src/protobuf_ts/generated/** --exclude=dist/** --exclude=tests/** --exclude=scripts/** --check-coverage --lines 75 --branches 75 --functions 75 --statements 75 --reporter=lcov --reporter=text --reports-dir=coverage node --import ./tests/register-ts-node-esm.mjs scripts/run-coverage-tests.cjs
scripts.test:coverage:uds: yarn build && node scripts/ensure-test-prereqs.cjs && c8 --all --src src --exclude-after-remap --exclude=src/**/*.d.ts --exclude=src/client_version.ts --exclude=src/protobuf_ts/generated/** --exclude=dist/** --exclude=tests/** --exclude=scripts/** --check-coverage --lines 75 --branches 75 --functions 75 --statements 75 --reporter=lcov --reporter=text --reports-dir=coverage node --import ./tests/register-ts-node-esm.mjs scripts/run-coverage-tests.cjs --transport uds
